metadata.notes: Q4_FY2023 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD). Q4_FY2024 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD). Q4_FY2025 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD).

tags.label: General and Administrative Expense
tags.reasoning: This tag covers general and administrative expenses, which is a major component of SG&A, though it may not include selling expenses

tags.label: Prepaid Expense and Other Assets, Current
Debt, Current
tags.reasoning: Direct match for current portion of debt obligations

tags.label: Common Stocks, Including Additional Paid in Capital
tags.reasoning: This tag represents common stock including additional paid-in capital, which is the standard presentation format

tags.label: Increase (Decrease) in Accounts Payable and Other Operating Liabilities
Proceeds from Issuance of Long-term Debt
Effect of Exchange Rate on Cash and Cash Equivalents
